problem.summary: Create a CDNA GEMM task skeleton that records MFMA, LDS staging, and Composable Kernel/CK Tile as the intended extension surfaces while keeping a portable scalar baseline.
outputs: C = A * B with FP32 accumulation
constraints: MFMA/LDS-staged path is TODO and should target an explicit gfx target
Composable Kernel/CK Tile is the reference extension path
Record gfx90a, gfx942, and gfx950 metadata separately when comparing targets

verification.method: Compare with CPU FP32 accumulation over rounded half inputs.

curation.notes: This skeleton exists so agents do not mix target-specific MFMA/LDS claims into generic rocWMMA tasks. No GPU benchmarking is attached.
